title: herdr: Is This the Ultimate Agent Multiplexer?
summary: Herdr is a Rust binary that acts as an agent multiplexer, allowing users to run multiple AI coding agents like Claude Code, OpenCode, and Codex side-by-side in persistent panes and tabs. It provides live status tracking and keyboard-driven navigation, built on ratatui without Electron, and includes a remote mode for orchestrating agents over SSH.
